title: Research and implement media handling solution
description: Research options for media handling (photos, videos) in the app. Evaluate mediabunny.dev and alternatives. Consider storage, transcoding, streaming, and optimization for mobile. Document findings and implement chosen solution.

title: Create repository unit tests
description: Create unit tests for repository layer. Part of Phase 1: test Effect repositories for all entities. Target 90%+ test coverage.

title: Add responsive design patterns
description: Add responsive design patterns for web app. Part of Web App Development: ensure mobile and web apps work seamlessly across devices.

title: Set up Lefthook pre-commit hooks
description: Set up pre-commit hooks with Lefthook. Part of Code Quality & DevOps: ensure quality gates run before commits.

title: Create custom Gororobas skills
description: Create custom skills for Gororobas-specific patterns. Part of AI/Coding Agent Infrastructure: EffectTS 3.19+ patterns, authorization dual-level permissions, Loro CRDT workflows.

title: Implement shared UI components with Expo
description: Implement shared UI components with Expo for web app. Part of Web App Development: mobile and web share code - maintain compatibility throughout development.

title: Implement Effect repository layer
description: Implement Effect repository layer for all domain entities. Part of Phase 1: add database transactions and error handling, create unit tests for repositories. Missing from current domain layer.

title: Wire up HTTP API endpoints
description: Wire up HTTP API endpoints to repository layer. Part of Phase 2: add request validation and error handling, implement rate limiting and security headers. HTTP API definitions are complete in domain layer.

title: Configure ESLint/Oxlint rules
description: Configure ESLint/Oxlint rules for Gororobas patterns. Part of Phase 4 Code Quality: zero TypeScript errors, passing linting and formatting.

title: AI/Coding Agent Infrastructure
description: Enhance AI and coding agent tooling including opencode-skills with quality guardrails, custom skills for Gororobas-specific patterns, automated code review checks, and continuous improvement workflows.

title: Run tests and fix any failures
description: After type-check passes, run pnpm run test and fix any test failures caused by the v4 migration. Update test expectations if needed to match new API behavior.

title: Set up Expo with shared code structure
description: Set up Expo project with shared code structure. Part of Phase 3: set up shared code with web app, implement mobile-specific features. Maintain compatibility with web throughout development.

title: Convert Loro CRDT workflow to production
description: Convert Loro CRDT workflow to production-ready service. Based on validated 013-full-revision-workflow.ts experiment. Ensure conflict resolution works for collaborative editing with revision history.

title: Architecture Validation
description: Validate and integrate architecture components including Electric Durable Streams for syncing, langextract for AI extraction, BetterAuth for authentication, and Loro CRDT workflow for collaborative editing.

title: Create VPS deployment scripts
description: Create deployment scripts for VPS target. Part of Phase 4 DevOps: automated deployment to VPS, monitoring and alerting.

title: Migrate Scope.extend to Scope.provide
description: Replace all Scope.extend calls with Scope.provide. Behavior is identical but the name better reflects the operation (providing a service to an effect).

title: Web App Development
description: Develop the web application using Tanstack Start, including project structure setup, shared UI components with Expo, web-specific layouts and navigation, and responsive design patterns.

title: Run type-check and fix compilation errors
description: After all migration changes, run pnpm run type-check and fix any remaining TypeScript compilation errors. This is the final validation step before considering the migration complete.

title: Rename packages/app to packages/mobile
description: Rename packages/app to packages/mobile. Part of Mobile App Development setup - prepare for Expo project with shared code structure.

title: Implement Tanstack Uniwind for web
description: Implement Tanstack Uniwind for web compatibility. Part of Technology Stack Validation - enables shared UI between mobile and web apps.

title: Implement Expo share target for media
description: Implement Expo share target that allows sharing media from other apps to Gororobas. Support adding media to the scratchpad or directly to one or more vegetables. Reference existing design at https://designs.magicpath.ai/v1/cleverly-shadow-4286

title: Migrate forking combinators to v4 API
description: Update forking methods: fork → forkChild, forkDaemon → forkDetach. Remove forkAll and forkWithErrorHandler. All fork variants now accept options object with startImmediately and uninterruptible.

title: Update Ref/Deferred/Fiber usage (no longer Effects)
description: Ref, Deferred, and Fiber are no longer Effect subtypes in v4. Replace: yield* ref → yield* Ref.get(ref), yield* deferred → yield* Deferred.await(deferred), yield* fiber → yield* Fiber.join(fiber). These types are now plain values, not effects.

title: Migrate to Effect v4 - Update all package versions
description: Update package.json files to use Effect v4 beta versions. All Effect ecosystem packages must use the same version (e.g., effect@4.0.0-beta.x). Packages to update: effect, @effect/vitest, @effect/platform, @effect/platform-node, @effect/sql, @effect/sql-sqlite-bun, @effect/cluster, @effect/experimental, @effect/workflow
close_reason: Updated all Effect packages to v4.0.0-beta.27. Removed packages that are now part of core effect package: @effect/sql, @effect/platform, @effect/cli, @effect/cluster, @effect/workflow. These are now available under effect/unstable/*

title: Update imports for consolidated packages
description: Many @effect/* packages have been merged into the core effect package. Update imports: @effect/platform → effect/unstable/platform (or check if now in effect/*), @effect/rpc → effect/unstable/rpc, @effect/cluster → effect/unstable/cluster, @effect/sql → effect/unstable/sql. Keep platform-specific packages like @effect/platform-node, @effect/sql-sqlite-bun.
close_reason: Updated import paths for consolidated packages: @effect/sql → effect/unstable/sql, @effect/workflow → effect/unstable/workflow, @effect/cluster → effect/unstable/cluster, @effect/platform (HTTP API) → effect/unstable/httpapi, @effect/platform (HTTP server) → effect/unstable/http, @effect/platform (FileSystem/Path) → effect, @effect/platform (Command) → effect/unstable/cli. Changed server to use @effect/platform-bun instead of @effect/platform-node. Some files will need additional fixes for API changes in subsequent tasks.

title: Code Quality & DevOps
description: Establish code quality standards and DevOps infrastructure including ESLint/Oxlint rules for Gororobas patterns, pre-commit hooks with Lefthook, deployment scripts for VPS target, and CI/CD pipeline with Docker/Dokploy.

title: Implement BDD step definitions
description: Implement step definitions for all 8 BDD feature files (1400+ lines of specs available). Part of Phase 1: create shared step libraries for common patterns, add test data factories and fixtures.

title: Set up property-based testing
description: Set up property-based testing for core business logic. Part of Testing Infrastructure: test authorization policies with dual-level permissions (platform + organization).

title: Set up Tanstack Start project
description: Set up Tanstack Start project structure. Part of Phase 3 Web App: implement core UI components, add authentication and navigation.

title: Implement automated code review
description: Implement automated code review checks. Part of Phase 4: zero TypeScript errors, passing linting and formatting, security audit.

title: Testing Infrastructure
description: Build comprehensive testing infrastructure including BDD step definitions for all 8 feature files, unit tests for repository layer, integration tests for HTTP API, and property-based testing for business logic.

title: Convert snake_case to camelCase in domain schemas and server code
description: Update all Schema property names from snake_case to camelCase to match the new SQL client transform configuration.
close_reason: Converted all Schema property names from snake_case to camelCase across domain schemas and server repositories to work with the new SQL client transform configuration.

title: Move durable-stream-sync to packages/server
description: Move 017-durable-stream-sync to packages/server/src/durable-streams, fix code smells, port tests
close_reason: Moved durable-stream-sync to packages/server/src/durable-streams with cleaned up code and passing tests

title: Set up continuous improvement workflows
description: Set up continuous improvement workflows. Part of AI/Coding Agent Infrastructure: enhance coding agent skills, implement continuous improvement processes.

title: Complete BetterAuth integration
description: Complete BetterAuth integration with proper session management. Part of Phase 1 Foundation: complete session management, add token validation and refresh logic, create user registration/authentication flows.

title: Implement database migrations
description: Implement database migrations and schema management. Part of Phase 2: finalize schema with migrations, add indexes and performance optimizations, implement backup and recovery procedures. Using SQLite.

title: Backend Implementation
description: Implement the backend layer including Effect repository layer, Effect services with authorization policies, HTTP API endpoints, and database migrations/schema management.

title: Validate langextract AI extraction
description: Validate langextract AI extraction pipeline for vegetables/tags. Part of architecture validation to ensure AI-powered content extraction works correctly.

title: Add API integration tests
description: Add integration tests for HTTP API endpoints. Part of Testing Infrastructure: validate complete HTTP API with proper error handling.

title: Implement CI/CD with Docker/Dokploy
description: Implement CI/CD pipeline with Docker/Dokploy. Part of Phase 4 DevOps: create Docker/Dokploy configurations, add monitoring and logging.

title: Update Cause error handling for flattened structure
description: Cause structure changed from recursive tree to flat array of Reasons. Update: pattern matching on cause._tag → iterate over cause.reasons array, isFailType → isFailReason, isDieType → isDieReason, isInterruptType → isInterruptReason, isEmptyType → cause.reasons.length === 0, catchSome → catchFilter with Filter module, *Exception classes → *Error classes.

title: Migrate FiberRef to ServiceMap.Reference
description: Replace FiberRef with ServiceMap.Reference. Built-in FiberRefs moved to References module: currentConcurrency → CurrentConcurrency, currentLogLevel → CurrentLogLevel, etc. Use yield* to read references instead of FiberRef.get. Use Effect.provideService instead of Effect.locally to set values.

title: Experiment with Electric Durable Streams
description: Experiment with Electric Durable Streams for real-time syncing. Part of Phase 3 syncing infrastructure - implement offline-first architecture and add conflict resolution strategies.

title: Create web layouts and navigation
description: Create web-specific layouts and navigation. Part of Phase 3 Web App: responsive design patterns, authentication flow integration.

title: Migrate services from Context.Tag/Effect.Service to ServiceMap.Service
description: Replace all Context.Tag, Context.GenericTag, and Effect.Service with ServiceMap.Service. Key changes: 1) Context.GenericTag<T>(id) → ServiceMap.Service<T>(id), 2) Context.Tag(id)<Self,Shape>() → ServiceMap.Service<Self,Shape>()(id), 3) Effect.Service with dependencies → ServiceMap.Service with make + explicit Layer.provide, 4) Remove static accessors, use Service.use or yield*

title: Implement realtime queries with SQLite & Effect Atom
description: Implement realtime queries using SQLite and Effect Atom. Explore Turso's live views feature for reactive data synchronization. Enable components to subscribe to query results that update automatically when underlying data changes.

title: Migrate Runtime usage to ServiceMap
description: Runtime<R> type removed. Use ServiceMap<R> instead. Replace Effect.runtime<R>() with Effect.services<R>(). Replace Runtime.runFork(runtime) with Effect.runForkWith(services).

title: Evaluate Tanstack DB as query layer alternative
description: Evaluate Tanstack DB as an alternative to direct SQLite queries for potentially better query performance. Compare against Turso's built-in IVM (Incremental View Maintenance). Document pros/cons and make recommendation.

title: Implement posts with commit logic and comments
description: Implement the full posts system including: 1) Commit-based revision system (as opposed to simple revisions) for tracking post history, 2) Comment system with proper authorization, 3) Machine-generated commits for automated actions like translations. This unblocks the post-translation-workflow.

title: Create Effect services with auth policies
description: Create Effect services using authorization policies from domain. Part of Phase 2: add business logic validation, implement background job processing. Authorization is dual-level (platform + organization).

title: Migrate error handling to v4 API
description: Update error handling combinators: catchAll → catch, catchAllCause → catchCause, catchAllDefect → catchDefect, catchSome → catchFilter, catchSomeCause → catchCauseFilter. Remove catchSomeDefect (no longer exists).

title: Enhance opencode-skills with guardrails
description: Enhance opencode-skills with quality guardrails. Part of AI/Coding Agent Infrastructure: ensure coding agents follow Gororobas patterns and quality standards.

title: Create mobile-specific UI components
description: Create mobile-specific UI components. Part of Mobile App Development: device-specific optimization needs, implement performance monitoring from day one.

title: Integrate knip for unused code detection
description:
Integrate knip (https://knip.dev) to detect unused code, exports, and dependencies across the monorepo.

## Why
- Keep codebase clean by identifying dead code
- Reduce bundle size by removing unused exports
- Detect unused dependencies in package.json files
- Improve maintainability

## Tasks
1. Add knip as dev dependency to root package.json
2. Create knip.json configuration with:
   - Monorepo support (workspaces)
   - Entry points (src/index.ts, test files)
   - Ignore patterns for generated files
   - Project references handling
3. Add `pnpm run knip` script
4. Run initial scan and document findings in issue notes
5. Add to CI workflow (optional, can be separate issue)

## References
- https://knip.dev
- https://knip.dev/guides/monorepos

title: Mobile App Development
description: Develop the mobile application using Expo, including renaming packages/app to packages/mobile, setting up shared code structure, implementing Tanstack Uniwind for web compatibility, and creating mobile-specific UI components.
